title: Advanced Structured Data Injection with Nested Payloads

title: CJK Prompt Injection - Expanded Chinese/Japanese/Korean Patterns

patterns.pattern: (私发|私發|私信发|私信發|偷偷发|偷偷發|悄悄发|悄悄發|暗中发|暗中發).{0,10}(红包|紅包|转账|轉帳|钱|錢|款项|款項|金额|金額)

title: Unauthorized Financial Action by AI Agent

Financial parameters in tool arguments (amount, currency, recipient)

title: High-Risk Tool Invocation Without Human Confirmation

patterns.pattern: (?i)(?<!get_)(?<!list_)(?<!check_)(?<!view_)(?<!fetch_)(?<!query_)(pay|payment|transfer|transaction|purchase|buy|checkout|billing|invoice|charge|refund|withdraw|deposit|subscribe|红包|紅包|转账|轉帳|付款|支付|汇款|匯款|充值|订阅|訂閱|送金|振込|결제|이체|송금)

patterns.pattern: (?i)(delete|remove|drop|truncate|purge|wipe|destroy|erase|reset|uninstall|revoke|terminate|kill|shutdown|format|删除|刪除|清空|销毁|銷毀|移除|卸载|卸載|削除|삭제|제거)

patterns.pattern: (?i)(send_message|send_email|send_sms|send_notification|post_message|post_tweet|post_comment|reply_message|publish|broadcast|发送消息|發送訊息|发邮件|發郵件|发短信|發簡訊|投稿|메시지_보내기)

patterns.pattern: (?i)(grant_access|change_role|modify_permissions|add_admin|set_owner|update_auth|change_password|reset_password|create_token|generate_key|invite_user|授权|授權|修改权限|修改權限|添加管理|변경_권한)
patterns.desc: Permission or authentication modification tool
System command execution tool
High-value operation (amount >= 100) without confirmation flag
Bulk or force operation targeting all/everyone

new Function() constructor used to compile and execute arbitrary code
Node.js vm module methods for running code in isolated or shared contexts

title: Bulk Environment Variable Harvesting and Exfiltration

Accessing the entire environment object rather than a specific variable
Running bare env command to list all environment variables
Reading .env files which contain application secrets
Loading dotenv combined with network call indicating exfiltration
Prompt injection attempting to override receiving agent's instructions
Injected instructions disguised as system updates
Requesting the receiving agent to forward its credentials
Embedded tool call instructions in agent message
Role reassignment injection attempting to change agent behavior

title: Agent Identity Spoofing and Authority Impersonation

patterns.desc: Direct claim of system or admin agent identity
Claiming to act on behalf of a privileged role
Claiming authority to override safety mechanisms
Messages framed as system-level commands or directives
Agent claiming to be a specific AI model to gain trust
Language encouraging blanket approval of all requests
Direct auto-approve or review bypass patterns
Minimizing language to reduce scrutiny of dangerous actions

Discouraging the human from reviewing individual actions

patterns.desc: Urgency language or account threat typical of phishing

Code paste service used as payload relay (ClawHavoc C2 infrastructure)

HTML comment containing instruction override
HTML comment with concealment directive
3+ Unicode Tag characters in UTF-8 encoding (invisible payload)
5+ zero-width characters spread through text (ASCII smuggling pattern)
